intro: Willoughbya lanuginosa, also known as "Fairy's Hair", is a rare and unique plant species native to Australia, characterized by its delicate, silky hairs that resemble the fine strands of human hair. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, including skin irritations and wounds, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
